history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, high-contrast, gritty selfie taken in a dimly lit room. A young man with a muscular physique is posing shirtless, holding a smartphone that is reflecting a strong, bright light directly into the camera, creating a dramatic lens flare that streaks across the image. He is wearing patterned shorts.

The background is cluttered and appears to be a bedroom or dressing area. To the left, there's a dark wooden slatted door or cabinet. To the right, a wall is adorned with various items hanging from a rack, including a dark tote bag with a graphic design (possibly a robot or mask), a white plastic bag, and other unidentifiable objects. Below the hanging items, there are stacked plastic drawers with stickers on them.

The lighting is harsh and directional, originating from the phone's flash, casting strong shadows and highlights that emphasize the man's abdominal muscles and torso. The overall mood is raw, intimate, and slightly moody due to the dramatic lighting and the monochrome palette. The style is reminiscent of candid, lo-fi photography.
